response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a solid ~20-year polyglot software engineering background that meets the minimum tenure requirement, but falls significantly short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI-related work is confined entirely to his current role (started April 2025), covering MCP tooling and agentic frameworks — genuine but nascent, not the 'recognized expertise' with shipped AI products or platforms the role requires. He has no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers on cloud or AI adoption, and no track record of driving organizational-level AI strategy; his career arc is that of a hands-on engineer and tech lead, not a director-level thought leader with cross-organizational or external influence.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Founding and sustaining GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform demonstrates real entrepreneurial drive and the ability to ship independently
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq shows active engagement with the emerging AI tooling ecosystem
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward) with no track record of recognized AI products, platforms, or thought leadership at scale
Career seniority has topped out at Staff Engineer level with no evidence of director-level scope, organizational influence, or advising strategic external customers or partners
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no public indicators of recognized AI expertise such as publications, major conference keynotes, or industry citations

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC requirement
Long polyglot engineering career and entrepreneurial experience
